text.message: hey blue I really need the 3:1 port. Can I offer you something to let me have it?
2 ore and i gift it to you
first time i stole from you
have a wheat if you want
can i have my ore now?
now you are the rest of the game solo blocked
you could have said "this doesn't count for the deal ok?"
because otherwise i would have blocked you and got the ore
enjoy the rest of the game
i am the block anyway no?
